description: Designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this pair of leather shoes from ganuchi is a great addition to your wardrobe. UpperStraps in thong style with a toe separator to hold the foot in placeErgonomically padded leather footbed for style and all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with brick-styled lugs for enhanced grip and traction on various surfacesslipper careUse a branded leather conditionerDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
